# Redis Cache Layer Dependencies
redis==5.0.1
hiredis==2.3.2  # C parser for performance
msgpack==1.0.7  # Fast binary serialization
numpy==1.24.3  # Array operations for weights/gradients
python-dotenv==1.0.0
pydantic==2.5.3
pydantic-settings==2.1.0

# Testing
pytest==7.4.3
pytest-asyncio==0.21.1
fakeredis==2.20.1  # Redis mock for testing
